portal_description:
Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation 4.21.7 security, enhancement & bug fix update

FIXED BUGS:
==========
DFBUGS-7100: CLONE [release-4.21] - RBD: VM's are being blocklisted by NodeGetVolumeStats Ops when Mass IO is triggered
DFBUGS-7099: [Backport to 4.21.z] ODF Console is breaking
DFBUGS-7067: RHODF 4.21.7 release
DFBUGS-6952: Upgrade the package on-headers to fix cve CVE-2025-7339
DFBUGS-6864: Backport to odf-4.21.z [RDR][CephFS] Relocate of CephFS workload fails with PVCs stuck in Terminating state
DFBUGS-6849: [4.21 clone] - 4.21 install fails for block-only storagecluster
DFBUGS-6844: Backport to odf-4.21.z intermittent S3 upload failures (HTTP 500 / InternalError) when uploading files to NooBaa buckets via JFrog Artifactory
DFBUGS-6829: [release-4.21][UI] External scale system page does not allow a second scale cluster to be connected
DFBUGS-6828: [release-4.21][UI] SAN Storage can be reached via breadcrumbs path when connected to external systems
DFBUGS-6811: [4.21] CLONE - [UI] - Storagecluster creation navigation broken.
DFBUGS-6810: [4.21] CLONE - [UI] Storage Consumers distribution of Storage Classes - page chrush
DFBUGS-6789: [Backport to odf-4.21.z][GSS] ODF Upgrade to v4.21.2 stuck on odf-blackbox-exporter due to immutable selector mismatch
DFBUGS-6741: Backport to odf-4.21.z ODF 4.16.21- noobaa-endpoint crashes with Exit Code 1 due to unhandled AbortError from @azure/storage-blob
DFBUGS-6725: [Backport to 4.21]  [ODF] INVALID_SCHEMA_REPLY SERVER after upgrading ODF to 4.21
DFBUGS-6703: Backport to odf-4.21.3 [GSS] Unnecessary OSD redeployments on 4.19.z upgrade for already-encrypted OSDs 
DFBUGS-6672: [Backport to odf-4.21.z] - Random Pod delete makes the container in openshift-storage.rbd.csi.ceph.com-nodeplugin-csi-addons restart
DFBUGS-6667: CLONE [ODF 4.21] - [IBM Z] - [OCP 4.22-ec.5][ODF 4.21.2]  - Storagecluster creation failed as monitor pod is not coming up completely
DFBUGS-6665: [Backport to odf-4.21.z] Remove duplicate PersistentVolumeUsageCritical alerts
DFBUGS-6540: [ODF 4.21.z CLONE] - Provider Server sends sub channel to client only when provider side csv is at the tip of the sub channel in the catalogsource
DFBUGS-6532: [Backport to 4.21.z][GSS] Missing default tolerations
DFBUGS-6530: [ODF 4.21.z] CLONE - Missing toleration for node.ocs.openshift.io/storage in rook-ceph-rbd-mirror pod
DFBUGS-6392: [release-4.21][Fusion-Access]LUN group shows Error during normal provisioning; should show a Progressing (or similar) intermediate state
DFBUGS-6326: Backport to odf-4.21.4 CLONE - [RDR]- Automatic creation of destination namespace with same SElinux/annotations on destination namespace
DFBUGS-5907: [Backport Bug 4.21.1] [Fusion Access] Connect and Create button enabled even when LUN Group name does not meet validation requirements
DFBUGS-5812: ocs-metrics-exporter pod stuck in CrashLoopBackOff with data replication separation
portal_solution:
Before applying this update, make sure all previously released errata
relevant to your system have been applied.

For details on how to apply this update, refer to:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.21/html/updating_openshift_data_foundation/updating-ocs-to-odf_rhodf
